name: tura
desc: Across 348 long-horizon benchmark sessions, Tura used up to 83.1% fewer turns on the rewrite benchmark and improved the DeepSWE pass rate by up to 16.7 percent…
descFull: Across 348 long-horizon benchmark sessions, Tura used up to 83.1% fewer turns on the rewrite benchmark and improved the DeepSWE pass rate by up to 16.7 percentage points compared with Codex CLI.
